name: Open Printer
summary: An unreleased open hardware-inspired inkjet project. The project pages publish planned specifications, but do not yet establish a shipped consumer product.
confirmedFacts: No campaign price or final shipping date was visible on the two reviewed project pages.
The developers state planned CUPS support and HP 63, HP 302, and HP 803 cartridge compatibility by region.
The developers state that project files will use CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, while also saying files will be released only after the final version is ready.
Open Tools says patent and design registrations have been filed.
dataBoundary: These are developer-published plans, not independently verified product performance. No retail unit, final speed, campaign price, shipment date, reliability record, or long-term parts supply was established by the reviewed pages.
watchItems: Whether the non-commercial license limits community manufacturing
Real print quality and reliability once independent reviews exist
